{ "name": "acorn", "description": "ECMAScript parser", "homepage": "https://github.com/acornjs/acorn", "main": "dist/acorn.js", "types": "dist/acorn.d.ts", "module": "dist/acorn.mjs", "exports": { ".": [ { "import": "./dist/acorn.mjs", "require": "./dist/acorn.js", "default": "./dist/acorn.js" }, "./dist/acorn.js" ], "./package.json": "./package.json" }, "version": "8.16.0", "engines": { "node": ">=0.4.0" }, "maintainers": [ { "name": "Marijn Haverbeke", "email": "marijnh@gmail.com", "web": "https://marijnhaverbeke.nl" }, { "name": "Ingvar Stepanyan", "email": "me@rreverser.com", "web": "https://rreverser.com/" }, { "name": "Adrian Heine", "web": "http://adrianheine.de" } ], "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/acornjs/acorn.git" }, "license": "MIT", "scripts": { "prepare": "cd ..; npm run build:main" }, "bin": { "acorn": "bin/acorn" } }
